sources.notes: Official English translation, Deutscher Bundestag, 2012 ed. Art. 1(1) and Art. 79(3) (eternity clause) are the key passages for this chain.

First government declaration to the Bundestag, 20 September 1949. Corroborates the constitutional-containment reading by showing the new sacred political order's explicit rejection of the Nazi-era collective-body logic at the moment of the Federal Republic's founding.
